_label_note: AU Stage A strict tier reconciled to deterministic strict-mode engine after Codex/GPT-assisted mismatch review; broader model-derived labels retained in ideal_must_detect for gap discovery. Generated placeholder/dummy ABN/ACN/TFN labels were removed from strict must_detect.

must_detect.matched_text:
To: Board Risk Committee, Northbridge Plains Limited (ASX: NBP) — From: Legal & Compliance — Re: Privacy Act and insider information controls for employment, health, credit, and transaction records.
We confirm no information in this memo is “not generally available” under s1043A Corporations Act 2001 (Cth); all references below relate to already-published process updates and non‑market‑sensitive materials.
Our Australian subsidiary Harborset Logistics Pty Ltd (ACN 123 456 789 — dummy only) maintains employee files, including WHS fitness-for-work certificates, payroll records, and corporate card reconciliations; handling is governed by the Privacy Act 1988 (Cth) and the APPs, and no ASX Listing Rule 3.1 disclosures are implicated.
One intentional identifier remains in scope for redaction prior to any external production: Australian Passport No. XJ4987654 recorded for a contractor’s maritime access clearance; access is restricted to HR and Security.
All other identifier-shaped entries in draft forms are placeholders for template testing: “TFN: 000 000 000”, “Medicare: 1234 56789‑1”, “ABN: 00 000 000 000”, “ACN: 999 999 999”, and “BSB/Account: 000‑000/00000000” (invalid/illustrative only).
Generic form labels in the onboarding pack (“Full Name”, “Date of Birth”, “Residential Address”, “Emergency Contact”, “Tax File Number”) are not populated and should not be treated as personal information until completed.
Credit reporting references appear only in the vendor onboarding guide (Privacy [Credit Reporting] Code context) and currently cite role titles (“Accounts Payable Officer”) rather than any individual.
Transactions cited in the finance procedure (“Invoice INV‑000000, Remittance ADVICE‑0000, Cost Centre CC‑0000”) are sample entries; no actual bank account or card PANs are included in the pack.
Health information is confined to a template “Fitness for Work” certificate with the fields intentionally blank; no diagnosis or provider details are present in the circulation copy.
Employment matters referenced (award updates and overtime policy) mirror the publicly posted policy on our website and a prior ASX operational update dated 12 Mar 2025 (ASX ref NBP‑ANN‑0012).
For avoidance of doubt, the draft due diligence Q&A set omits any supplier credit checks beyond high‑level criteria; there is no unpublished contract pricing or earnings guidance embedded.
Queries should be directed to compliance@northbridgeplains.com.au (role mailbox) or the fictional ASX Information Line on 1800 000 321; do not contact individual staff regarding these templates.
If an external disclosure is contemplated (e.g., union request or subpoena), apply APP 6 and the NDB scheme triage and ensure the passport number above is redacted and audit‑logged.
